name: Telegram Mini App read surfaces for budgets, groups, and insights
description: Add TWA read-first pages for budgets, groups, and lightweight insights using existing worker data contracts, optimized for mobile WebView instead of desktop-style dashboards.

planned: Reuse existing worker analytics, budget, group, and expense query contracts instead of inventing TWA-only APIs first.
Design read surfaces for fast scan and drill-down, not for desktop-card parity.
Lazy-load heavier analytics views and keep the default TWA path focused on fast open and quick context.

notes: This feature aims for useful mobile read flows, not one-to-one visual parity with `apps/web`.
